title: Venugopalaswami Temple, Kaliappettai

overview.short: Venugopalaswamy Temple is a Hindu temple located in the village of Kaliappettai in the Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Venugopalaswamy Temple is a Hindu temple located in the village of Kaliappettai in the Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Krishna.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Chingleput
topPlaces.description: The Diocese of Chingleput (Latin: Chingleputen(sis)) is a Latin Church ecclesiastical jurisdiction or diocese of the Catholic Church in India. Its episcopal see is Chingleput.

topPlaces.name: Melamaiyur
topPlaces.description: Melamaiyur is a census town in Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kolavai Lake
topPlaces.description: Kolavai Lake is a lake adjoining the town of Chengalpattu in Tamil Nadu, India. The lake is located about 60 kilometres (37 mi) from Chennai, and is close to Paranur railway station and Chengalpattu Junction railway station.

topPlaces.name: Paranur
topPlaces.description: Paranur is a village in India near the busy GST Road or National Highway 45. It has a railway station and few hundred houses, and is 44 km from Chennai International Airport in Tirusulam.

topPlaces.name: Chengalpattu taluk
topPlaces.description: Chengalpattu taluk is a taluk of Chengalpattu district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Chengalpattu.

topPlaces.name: Chengalpattu
topPlaces.description: Chengalpattu, previously known as Chingleput or Chengalpet, is a town in Chennai metropolitan area and the headquarters of Chengalpattu district of the state Tamil Nadu, India. The town is located near the industrial and IT hub.

topPlaces.name: Cheyyar River
topPlaces.description: Cheyyaru River is an important seasonal river that runs through the Tiruvannamalai District of the state of Tamil Nadu in South India. It is a tributary of Palar River, a river which originates in Jawadhu Hills and flows through Thiruvannamalai district before entering into the Bay of Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Tirumani
topPlaces.description: Tirumani is a suburb of Chennai located south of Chengalpattu, India. According to Census 2011 information the location code or village code of Thirumani village is 629867.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Venugopalaswami Temple, Kaliappettai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Venugopalaswami Temple, Kaliappettai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Venugopalaswami Temple, Kaliappettai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Venugopalaswami Temple, Kaliappettai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Venugopalaswami Temple, Kaliappettai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Venugopalaswami Temple, Kaliappettai?
faq.a: Stays in Venugopalaswami Temple, Kaliappettai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Venugopalaswami Temple, Kaliappettai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diocese of Chingleput, Melamaiyur, Kolavai Lake, Paranur, Chengalpattu taluk.
